_comment: Cyclomatic-complexity ratchet allowlist. Maps 'relpath::qualified_name' -> current CC for genuinely-hard functions that already exceed the ceiling (15). These are grandfathered/frozen debt: new or edited code MUST stay <= 15, but existing entries here are tolerated at (or below) the recorded CC. Lowering an entry's real CC below the recorded value is fine; exceeding it is a violation. Remove an entry once its function is decomposed under the ceiling.
